name: Goda Masala
description: Our signature Goda Masala is a traditional Maharashtrian blend of hand-picked spices, slow-roasted to perfection for that authentic sweet and savory aroma.

specifications.Key Ingredients: Coriander seeds, cumin, sesame, stone flower, cinnamon, clove

galleryImages.alt: Goda Masala in a warm heritage product setting

useCases.caption: Elevate everyday dal with sweet, aromatic depth.

useCases.title: Bharli Vangi
useCases.caption: The essential stuffing spice for classic eggplant.

useCases.title: Misal
useCases.caption: Adds roasted fragrance to spicy misal bases.

useCases.title: Varan Bhaat
useCases.caption: A comforting finish for rice and dal meals.

reviews.text: Exactly like my grandmother used to make. The aroma hits you as soon as you open the jar.
Great quality spice blend. Not too spicy, perfectly balanced, and very fresh.

name: Tea Masala
description: A fragrant chai companion with warming spices that make every cup rich, cozy, and balanced.

specifications.Key Ingredients: Cardamom, ginger, cinnamon, clove, black pepper
specifications.Best With: Milk tea, ginger tea, winter tea

useCases.title: Masala Chai
useCases.caption: Aromatic morning tea with comforting spice.

useCases.title: Ginger Tea

useCases.title: Winter Tea
useCases.caption: A warming cup for cool evenings.

reviews.text: A pinch makes the whole kitchen smell like fresh chai.

name: Garam Masala
description: A deep, balanced finishing blend for curries, rice dishes, and everyday home cooking.

specifications.Key Ingredients: Coriander, cumin, clove, cinnamon, black pepper, bay leaf
specifications.Use: Add near the end of cooking

useCases.title: Paneer Curry
useCases.caption: Rounds out creamy paneer gravies.

useCases.title: Biryani
useCases.caption: Adds depth to rice and layered masala.

useCases.caption: A final flourish for smoky tadka.

reviews.text: Fresh and balanced. It does not overpower the dish.

name: Turmeric Powder
description: Bright, earthy turmeric powder for daily cooking, golden milk, pickles, and traditional recipes.

useCases.title: Curries
useCases.caption: Adds color and depth to everyday cooking.

reviews.text: The color is beautiful and a little goes a long way.

name: Kanda Lasun Masala
description: A bold onion-garlic masala with fiery Maharashtrian character for rich curries and non-veg dishes.

specifications.Key Ingredients: Dry onion, garlic, red chili, coriander, cumin
specifications.Best With: Tambda rassa, sukka mutton, egg curry

useCases.caption: Fiery Kolhapuri-style gravy depth.

useCases.title: Sukka Mutton
useCases.caption: Bold roasted flavor for dry preparations.

useCases.caption: Quickly builds a spicy curry base.

reviews.text: Quite spicy, just how we like it. Perfect for rassa.

name: Chaat Masala
description: Tangy, lively, and bright. A finishing sprinkle for snacks, fruit, buttermilk, and salads.

specifications.Key Ingredients: Dry mango, cumin, black salt, coriander, chili
